name: Chocolate Yule Log1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a 15 x 10 x 1-inch jellyroll pan with vegetable oil and line it with wax paper.
2. In a bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs until foamy. Gradually add 1 cup sugar, beating until thick and lemon-colored (about 5 to 6 minutes).
4. Stir in water and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually fold in the flour mixture.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until set.
7. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack, seam side down.
8. Unroll cake and spread Yule Log Frosting evenly over it.
9. To make the finishing frosting, combine the remaining Yule Log Frosting with 1/4 cup powdered sugar and cocoa in a bowl. Beat until blended.
10. Spread this mixture over the cake roll and use fork tines to create a bark-like texture.
11. Slice and serve. This recipe serves 8 to 10 people.
